name: Stir-Fried Cucumbers and Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off both ends of cucumbers and slice thinly.
2. In a bowl, place the cucumbers and sprinkle with 1 teaspoon salt; let stand 5-10 minutes.
3. When the cucumbers are flexible, wrap in a cloth or paper towel and squeeze out water.
4. Cut beef into julienne strips.
5. Heat salad oil. Quickly stir-fry beef over high heat and season with Mixture A.
6. Add cucumber slices and stir-fry briefly. Season with Mixture B.
7. Transfer to serving plate and garnish with shredded chili pepper.
